boundary_binding.action_boundary: Fulfillment exception requires exact boundary closure
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source records do not close boundary
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Exception code must match order and date

critical_features_preserved: exception code must match order and date
final_answer: Source records do not close the exact fulfillment-exception boundary. The controlling control record says the needed exception code match is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently. Because the dependency remains unresolved, the action may not proceed. Escalate for exact closure before any execution.
open_blockers: exception code must match order and date
